creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
On 07/01/2011 16:05, Stephen Montgomery-Smith wrote:
> Yuri,
>
> I'll be happy to commit your ports.  But do you know what arved meant 
> about a newer version being available?  I looked around, and I 
> couldn't find any fedora 10 version of ibus-libs more recent than 
> 1.1.0.20090829.
>
> If you cannot find anything more recent, or if you update the patch, I 
> will go ahead and commit it.


Hi Stephen,

This was quite a while ago. Now I need to update them. Need to see what 
is the current version.
The primary purpose of those was to enable linux-apps like Skype to 
support international languages through IBus.

I will update those ports and check hey work and will write you back.

Thank you!
Yuri
